/usr/bin/c++  -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  "CMakeFiles/kestrel-imap-lab.dir/kestrel-imap-lab_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kestrel-imap-lab.dir/src/imaplab_main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kestrel-imap-lab.dir/src/tools/imaplabcontroller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kestrel-imap-lab.dir/src/core/accounts/accountrepository.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kestrel-imap-lab.dir/src/core/auth/filetokenvault.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kestrel-imap-lab.dir/build-release/.qt/rcc/qrc_kestrel_imap_lab_qml.cpp.o" -o kestrel-imap-lab  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
